proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with feature_005=1 have a higher objective_response rate than patients with feature_005=0.
Patients with feature_034=1 have a lower objective_response rate than patients with feature_034=0.

analyses.result_summary: feature_005=1 response rate was 0.3614 vs 0.1589 for feature_005=0; risk difference 0.2024 (two-proportion z-test p=<1e-16).
feature_034=1 response rate was 0.1535 vs 0.3460 for feature_034=0; risk difference -0.1925 (two-proportion z-test p=<1e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for the strongest binary features (feature_005, feature_034, feature_065, feature_009, feature_055, feature_067, feature_025, feature_053), feature_005=1 remains associated with higher objective_response on the risk-difference scale.

After adjustment for the strongest binary features (feature_005, feature_034, feature_065, feature_009, feature_055, feature_067, feature_025, feature_053), feature_034=1 remains associated with lower objective_response on the risk-difference scale.

analyses.result_summary: Multivariable linear probability model coefficient for feature_005 was 0.2024 with robust p=<1e-16.
Multivariable linear probability model coefficient for feature_034 was -0.1927 with robust p=<1e-16.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with feature_003 one standard deviation above the cohort mean have a lower objective_response probability than otherwise similar patients with feature_003 at the mean.

analyses.result_summary: feature_003 had a one-SD linear probability slope of -0.0373 for objective_response (mean 42.6686, SD 92.8450, p=<1e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint presence of feature_034=1 and feature_005=1 has objective_response lower than expected under additivity compared with the sum of their separate risk differences.

analyses.result_summary: Additive interaction feature_034 x feature_005 was -0.4326; cell response rates p00=0.1693, p10=0.1505, p01=0.6096, p11=0.1581 (p=<1e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the feature_005=1 subgroup, feature_034=1 is associated with lower objective_response than feature_034=0.
Within the feature_005=0 subgroup, feature_034=1 is associated with lower objective_response than feature_034=0.

analyses.result_summary: Among feature_005=1 patients, feature_034=1 response rate was 0.1581 vs 0.6096 for feature_034=0; risk difference -0.4515 (p=<1e-16).
Among feature_005=0 patients, feature_034=1 response rate was 0.1505 vs 0.1693 for feature_034=0; risk difference -0.0188 (p=1.011e-5).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint presence of feature_065=1 and feature_009=1 has objective_response higher than expected under additivity compared with the sum of their separate risk differences.

analyses.result_summary: Additive interaction feature_065 x feature_009 was 0.1263; cell response rates p00=0.2730, p10=0.1471, p01=0.1599, p11=0.1602 (p=<1e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with feature_034=1 have a lower objective_response rate than patients with feature_034=0.
Patients with feature_065=1 have a lower objective_response rate than patients with feature_065=0.
Patients with feature_009=1 have a lower objective_response rate than patients with feature_009=0.

analyses.result_summary: feature_034=1 response rate was 0.1535 vs 0.3460 for feature_034=0; risk difference -0.1925 (p=<1e-16).
feature_065=1 response rate was 0.1497 vs 0.2503 for feature_065=0; risk difference -0.1005 (p=<1e-16).
feature_009=1 response rate was 0.1599 vs 0.2604 for feature_009=0; risk difference -0.1005 (p=<1e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The one-SD feature_003 association with objective_response is more positive when feature_009=1 than when feature_009=0.

analyses.result_summary: Linear probability model interaction between standardized feature_003 and feature_009 was 0.0322 (robust p=<1e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among the strongest three binary features (feature_005, feature_034, feature_065), the three-way departure from additivity in objective_response is positive.

analyses.result_summary: The three-way linear probability interaction feature_005:feature_034:feature_065 was 0.5182 with robust p=<1e-16.
